stories.title: Why physical AI is the real manufacturing revolution
stories.summary: Physical AI promises to transform manufacturing, but only if robotics developers and integrators avoid hype and address real scaling challenges, writes Fictiv. The post Why physical AI is the real manufacturing revolution appeared first on The Robot Report .
